trigger_keywords: eliminar los sedimentos de la botella
eliminar las lias en el metodo tradicional

steps.label: cause
steps.text: After riddling, the yeast sediment is concentrated in the neck of the inverted bottle.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The neck is frozen and the crown cap is removed; internal pressure ejects the frozen plug containing the lees.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The sediment is removed rapidly while preserving most of the dissolved carbon dioxide and limiting oxidation.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The sediment is removed rapidly while preserving most of the dissolved carbon dioxide and limiting oxidation.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
